description: Labeled evaluation set over the bundled Nimbus Robotics corpus. Each question lists the source document(s) that contain the answer (relevant_sources) and answer keywords that a grounded answer must contain.

questions.question: How long does the Atlas-7 battery last and how fast can it swap?
What is the maximum payload of the Atlas-7?
How does Conductor prevent collisions and deadlocks?
How does the Conductor API authenticate requests?
What programming languages are approved for production at Nimbus?
How many approvals does a safety-critical firmware change require?
How much parental leave do employees get?
How many vacation days do full-time employees receive?
How much funding has Nimbus raised in total?
